requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions for Lighting (ZS/CISPR 15 vs CN GB 17743)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明 EMC 发射（ZS/CISPR 15 vs 中国 GB 17743）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明 EMC 發射（ZS/CISPR 15 vs 中國 GB 17743）

summary.en: LED luminaires imported into Zambia are expected to meet the radio-disturbance (EMC emissions) requirements for electrical lighting under the Zambian Standard adopting CISPR 15 (ZS/IEC/CISPR 15 or its national equivalent referenced by ZABS). CISPR 15 covers conducted emissions on the mains terminals (150 kHz to 30 MHz) and radiated emissions. Compliance is assessed as part of ZABS conformity / import inspection for in-scope electrical products; the importer presents a test report against the applicable standard. Zambia does not operate a separate self-declared CE-style EMC Declaration of Conformity; the operative mechanism is ZABS conformity assessment / import inspection. Where the luminaire also has radio functionality, ZICTA type approval applies separately (see ledzm-emc-02).
summary.zh: 进口至赞比亚的 LED 灯具应满足采用 CISPR 15 的赞比亚标准（ZS/IEC/CISPR 15 或 ZABS 引用的国家等效标准）下电气照明的无线电骚扰（EMC 发射）要求。CISPR 15 涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及辐射发射。符合性作为 ZABS 对范围内电气产品的符合性 / 进口检验的一部分进行评定；进口商须提交对照适用标准的检测报告。赞比亚不实行类似 CE 的自我声明式 EMC 符合性声明；起作用的机制是 ZABS 合格评定 / 进口检验。若灯具同时具备无线功能，则另适用 ZICTA 型号核准（见 ledzm-emc-02）。
summary.zht: 進口至尚比亞的 LED 燈具應滿足採用 CISPR 15 的尚比亞標準（ZS/IEC/CISPR 15 或 ZABS 引用的國家等效標準）下電氣照明的無線電騷擾（EMC 發射）要求。CISPR 15 涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及輻射發射。符合性作為 ZABS 對範圍內電氣產品的符合性 / 進口檢驗的一部分進行評定；進口商須提交對照適用標準的檢測報告。尚比亞不實行類似 CE 的自我聲明式 EMC 符合性聲明；起作用的機制是 ZABS 合格評定 / 進口檢驗。若燈具同時具備無線功能，則另適用 ZICTA 型號核准（見 ledzm-emc-02）。

standards_or_laws: Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) — conformity / import inspection scheme for electrical products
ZS / IEC / CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (Zambian adoption of CISPR 15)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (covering safety and EMC for relevant product categories). Testing is conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically accepted by ZABS; acceptance depends on the laboratory's accreditation status and ZABS recognition.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被 ZABS 自动接受；是否接受取决于实验室的认可状态及 ZABS 的认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被 ZABS 自動接受；是否接受取決於實驗室的認可狀態及 ZABS 的認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both the Zambian (ZS/CISPR 15) and Chinese (GB 17743) standards derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized at the technical level. The gap is procedural rather than technical: (1) China demonstrates EMC through CCC; Zambia demonstrates it through ZABS conformity / import inspection, which are separate, non-mutual processes; (2) a CN CCC EMC test report is not automatically accepted by ZABS — acceptance depends on the test laboratory's accreditation (ideally ILAC MRA-recognised) and ZABS's recognition policy for the route used; (3) the importer of record in Zambia presents the documentation at import inspection, so the in-country importer must hold a test report acceptable to ZABS. Because the CISPR 15 technical base is shared, re-testing burden may be limited, but the conformity pathway and documentation must satisfy ZABS, not CCC.
gap.zh: 赞比亚（ZS/CISPR 15）与中国（GB 17743）标准均源自 CISPR 15，因此发射限值在技术层面基本协调。差距在于程序而非技术：（1）中国通过 CCC 证明 EMC，赞比亚通过 ZABS 符合性 / 进口检验证明，二者为独立、非互认的流程；（2）中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被 ZABS 自动接受——是否接受取决于检测实验室的认可（最好为 ILAC MRA 认可）及 ZABS 对所用路径的认可政策；（3）赞比亚记录在案的进口商须在进口检验时提交文件，因此在地进口商须持有 ZABS 可接受的检测报告。由于共享 CISPR 15 技术基础，重新检测负担可能有限，但合格评定路径及文件须满足 ZABS 而非 CCC。
gap.zht: 尚比亞（ZS/CISPR 15）與中國（GB 17743）標準均源自 CISPR 15，因此發射限值在技術層面基本協調。差距在於程序而非技術：（1）中國通過 CCC 證明 EMC，尚比亞通過 ZABS 符合性 / 進口檢驗證明，二者為獨立、非互認的流程；（2）中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被 ZABS 自動接受——是否接受取決於檢測實驗室的認可（最好為 ILAC MRA 認可）及 ZABS 對所用路徑的認可政策；（3）尚比亞記錄在案的進口商須在進口檢驗時提交文件，因此在地進口商須持有 ZABS 可接受的檢測報告。由於共享 CISPR 15 技術基礎，重新檢測負擔可能有限，但合格評定路徑及文件須滿足 ZABS 而非 CCC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (via ZABS conformity / import inspection) — EMC emissions to the Zambian adoption of CISPR 15 expected for in-scope electrical lighting; test evidence presented at import inspection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emissions for LED lighting in Zambia follow the Zambian adoption of CISPR 15, assessed through ZABS conformity / import inspection rather than a CE-style self-declared EMC DoC. The limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but a CN CCC EMC report is not automatically accepted by ZABS — confirm laboratory accreditation and ZABS recognition, and ensure the in-country importer holds documentation acceptable at import inspection.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚 LED 照明的 EMC 发射遵循赞比亚采用的 CISPR 15，通过 ZABS 符合性 / 进口检验评定，而非类似 CE 的自我声明式 EMC 符合性声明。限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC EMC 报告不被 ZABS 自动接受——请确认实验室认可及 ZABS 认可，并确保在地进口商持有进口检验时可接受的文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞 LED 照明的 EMC 發射遵循尚比亞採用的 CISPR 15，通過 ZABS 符合性 / 進口檢驗評定，而非類似 CE 的自我聲明式 EMC 符合性聲明。限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC EMC 報告不被 ZABS 自動接受——請確認實驗室認可及 ZABS 認可，並確保在地進口商持有進口檢驗時可接受的文件。

requirement_topic.en: ZICTA Type Approval for Radio-Enabled Smart Luminaires (vs CN SRRC)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线智能灯具的 ZICTA 型号核准（vs 中国 SRRC）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線智能燈具的 ZICTA 型號核准（vs 中國 SRRC）

summary.en: LED luminaires that incorporate radio functionality — Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other RF for smart/connected lighting — require type approval from the Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority (ZICTA) before they may be imported, sold, or used in Zambia. ZICTA type approval is a radio-equipment regulatory step that is separate from, and additional to, ZABS product-safety / EMC conformity. The applicant (commonly the in-country importer or an authorised representative) submits the device's RF test reports and technical documentation to ZICTA for the approval. A purely passive (non-radio) LED luminaire does not require ZICTA approval; the trigger is the presence of a radio transmitter.
summary.zh: 集成无线功能的 LED 灯具——Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或用于智能 / 互联照明的其他射频——在赞比亚进口、销售或使用前，须取得赞比亚信息和通信技术管理局（ZICTA）的型号核准。ZICTA 型号核准是无线电设备的监管步骤，独立于并附加于 ZABS 产品安全 / EMC 符合性之外。申请人（通常为在地进口商或授权代表）须向 ZICTA 提交设备的射频检测报告及技术文件以取得核准。纯被动（无无线电）的 LED 灯具不需要 ZICTA 核准；触发条件是存在无线电发射机。
summary.zht: 集成無線功能的 LED 燈具——Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或用於智能 / 互聯照明的其他射頻——在尚比亞進口、銷售或使用前，須取得尚比亞信息和通信技術管理局（ZICTA）的型號核准。ZICTA 型號核准是無線電設備的監管步驟，獨立於並附加於 ZABS 產品安全 / EMC 符合性之外。申請人（通常為在地進口商或授權代表）須向 ZICTA 提交設備的射頻檢測報告及技術文件以取得核准。純被動（無無線電）的 LED 燈具不需要 ZICTA 核准；觸發條件是存在無線電發射機。

standards_or_laws: Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority (ZICTA) — type approval for radio communications / RF equipment
Zambia Information and Communication Technologies Act — regulatory basis for radio-equipment type approval

summary.en: In China, radio-enabled luminaires (e.g., Wi-Fi/Bluetooth smart LED) require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval / radio transmission equipment type approval before they may be manufactured for sale or imported, in addition to CCC for safety/EMC. SRRC type approval governs the radio module's spectrum use and emission characteristics. SRRC approval is specific to the Chinese market and is not recognised by ZICTA; a separate ZICTA approval is needed for Zambia.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具（如 Wi-Fi/蓝牙智能 LED）在制造销售或进口前，除安全 / EMC 的 CCC 外，还须取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准 / 无线电发射设备型号核准。SRRC 型号核准管控无线电模块的频谱使用及发射特性。SRRC 核准仅针对中国市场，不被 ZICTA 认可；赞比亚需要单独的 ZICTA 核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具（如 Wi-Fi/藍牙智能 LED）在製造銷售或進口前，除安全 / EMC 的 CCC 外，還須取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准 / 無線電發射設備型號核准。SRRC 型號核准管控無線電模組的頻譜使用及發射特性。SRRC 核准僅針對中國市場，不被 ZICTA 認可；尚比亞需要單獨的 ZICTA 核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC — State Radio Regulation Commission radio transmission equipment type approval (China)

gap.en: For smart/connected LED luminaires, the radio-approval authority differs entirely: China uses SRRC, Zambia uses ZICTA, and there is no mutual recognition. A Chinese smart luminaire already holding SRRC approval must obtain separate ZICTA type approval for Zambia, typically supported by RF/radio test reports. The application is usually made by the in-country importer or an authorised local entity, so the exporter must arrange a Zambian importer able to file with ZICTA. Note the trigger: only luminaires containing a radio transmitter need ZICTA approval — a standard non-connected LED luminaire is outside the ZICTA radio regime (though it still needs ZABS conformity and EMC). Allow lead time for ZICTA processing before the first shipment of connected products.
gap.zh: 对于智能 / 互联 LED 灯具，无线电核准主管机构完全不同：中国用 SRRC，赞比亚用 ZICTA，且无互认。已持有 SRRC 核准的中国智能灯具须为赞比亚单独取得 ZICTA 型号核准，通常以射频 / 无线电检测报告作为支持。申请通常由在地进口商或授权当地实体提出，因此出口商须安排能向 ZICTA 提交申请的赞比亚进口商。注意触发条件：仅含无线电发射机的灯具需要 ZICTA 核准——标准非联网 LED 灯具不在 ZICTA 无线电体系之内（但仍需 ZABS 符合性及 EMC）。请为联网产品首次出货前的 ZICTA 处理预留时间。
gap.zht: 對於智能 / 互聯 LED 燈具，無線電核准主管機構完全不同：中國用 SRRC，尚比亞用 ZICTA，且無互認。已持有 SRRC 核准的中國智能燈具須為尚比亞單獨取得 ZICTA 型號核准，通常以射頻 / 無線電檢測報告作為支持。申請通常由在地進口商或授權當地實體提出，因此出口商須安排能向 ZICTA 提交申請的尚比亞進口商。注意觸發條件：僅含無線電發射機的燈具需要 ZICTA 核准——標準非聯網 LED 燈具不在 ZICTA 無線電體系之內（但仍需 ZABS 符合性及 EMC）。請為聯網產品首次出貨前的 ZICTA 處理預留時間。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for radio-enabled products — ZICTA type approval required before import/sale/use of Wi-Fi/Bluetooth/Zigbee smart luminaires in Zambia; not required for purely passive (non-radio) luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for radio-enabled products — SRRC type approval required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China, in addition to CCC

source.publisher: Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority (ZICTA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart/connected LED luminaires with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or Zigbee require ZICTA type approval before import, sale, or use in Zambia — separate from and additional to ZABS product conformity. China's SRRC approval is not recognised by ZICTA, so a fresh ZICTA approval (supported by RF test reports, usually filed by the in-country importer) is needed. Purely passive LED luminaires fall outside the ZICTA radio regime. Build in ZICTA lead time before shipping connected products.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 具备 Wi-Fi、蓝牙或 Zigbee 的智能 / 互联 LED 灯具在赞比亚进口、销售或使用前须取得 ZICTA 型号核准——独立于并附加于 ZABS 产品符合性之外。中国 SRRC 核准不被 ZICTA 认可，因此需要新的 ZICTA 核准（以射频检测报告支持，通常由在地进口商提交）。纯被动 LED 灯具不在 ZICTA 无线电体系之内。请在出货联网产品前预留 ZICTA 处理时间。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 具備 Wi-Fi、藍牙或 Zigbee 的智能 / 互聯 LED 燈具在尚比亞進口、銷售或使用前須取得 ZICTA 型號核准——獨立於並附加於 ZABS 產品符合性之外。中國 SRRC 核准不被 ZICTA 認可，因此需要新的 ZICTA 核准（以射頻檢測報告支持，通常由在地進口商提交）。純被動 LED 燈具不在 ZICTA 無線電體系之內。請在出貨聯網產品前預留 ZICTA 處理時間。
